title: Star Raiders: The Adventures of Saber Raine
original_title: Star Raiders: The Adventures of Saber Raine
overview: Saber Raine is hired to guide three elite soldiers on a rescue mission to recover a prince and princess who have been abducted from their home world. The trail leads Saber and his allies to a planet deep within uncharted space that is inhabited by strange mutated creatures.
